programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: Fukushima Time-Lapse
programme.desc: Ten years on from the 2011 tsunami and nuclear disaster, time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke seeks out the undiminished beauty of Fukushima - this time we focus on forests.

programme.title: Japan From Above: Up Close
programme.desc: This programme takes you on an aerial journey across 21st-century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights

programme.title: Sumopedia

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Manben: Behind The Scenes Of Manga
programme.desc: Sakamoto Shin-ichi, a master of realistic imagery, works completely digitally to build manga made for the 21st century - watch and learn what drives the creator as he starts a new manga series.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.desc: Sakai Osamu is a creator who incorporates complex historical and scientific information into easy-to-understand works of art, employing a variety of expressive techniques that change with each theme.

programme.desc: Legend has it that a powerful 'man-beast' inhabits the cloud forests of Ecuador - what we discovered, however, was hardly mysterious: an agile bear species whose playful young frolic in the treetops!

programme.title: Trails To Oishii Tokyo Mini

programme.title: Barakan Discovers
programme.desc: Peter Barakan discovers the Murakami Kaizoku, a band of 'pirates' who watched over Japan's Seto Inland Sea in centuries past. Far from stealing, they actually guided ships to safety.

programme.title: Manben: Behind The Scenes Of Manga
programme.desc: Sakamoto Shin-ichi, a master of realistic imagery, works completely digitally to build manga made for the 21st century - watch and learn what drives the creator as he starts a new manga series.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Rising
programme.desc: Follow a unique organization that helps children with chronic medical conditions to unlock their potential through sports and placements with professional and university sports teams.

programme.title: Danko & Danta, Cardboard Craft...
programme.desc: 'Danko & Danta, Cardboard Craft Creations'. Tent: Cardboard girl Danko, her friend Danta, and craft master Mr Snips make cool things out of cardboard - this time they make a tent big enough to play in. Create your own secret hideaway!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Anime Supernova
programme.desc: Sakai Osamu is a creator who incorporates complex historical and scientific information into easy-to-understand works of art, employing a variety of expressive techniques that change with each theme.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Legend has it that a powerful 'man-beast' inhabits the cloud forests of Ecuador - what we discovered, however, was hardly mysterious: an agile bear species whose playful young frolic in the treetops!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: NHK Documentary
programme.desc: An NHK crew spent two-and-a-half years covering a Tokyo-area hospital's efforts to treat coronavirus - we follow its staff as they help patients fight back from the brink of death.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Four Seasons In Japan
programme.desc: Soaring high, Mount Higashi-Akaishi is a rock-strewn peak that nurtures rare summer flowers - in autumn, the nuts of Japanese white pines attract spotted nutcrackers who store them for the winter.

programme.title: The Seasons Of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with pianist Mine Kawakami - for which she plays exclusive pieces - helps you experience each season.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Bedtime Routine: On hot and humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes, we learn about the tools Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight these pesky insects.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a sumo highlights programme for fans around the globe featuring all top-division bouts from Day 14 of the latest Grand Sumo tournament in Fukuoka.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Unknown Master Of Restoration
programme.desc: Koji Mayuyama, a pottery restorer, secretly kept a number of damaged items from antique dealers and returned them to their original condition. Discover his secret workshop.

programme.title: Spiritual Explorers
programme.desc: The eerie landscape of Osorezan is a sacred site, long regarded as the entrance to the afterlife. Explore the Japanese view on life and death.

programme.title: Framing Everyday's Moments
programme.desc: A unique time-lapse photography project, shot by pros and non-pros from around the world, on the transience of nature, celestial phenomena, cityscapes and each single moment of everyday life.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Folding fans - cooling accessories encapsulate elegance. Dive deep into the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Wild Hokkaido!
programme.desc: Sapporo is a metropolitan city crisscrossed by so many rivers - our programme host gets on a subway train from the centre of the city and then walks along the rivers to a campground.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Nishijin textiles are famed for their intricate designs and textures woven with silk threads - Hosoo Masataka, head of his family's textile firm, shares how he aims to further this traditional craft.

programme.title: No Art, No Life Plus
programme.desc: Outsider artists like Hatae Hiroko are gaining recognition around the world - although she creates mainly for herself, others have taken notice. See how these artists live and work.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: Featured recipe: Squid Yakisoba. Learn about easy, delicious, and healthy cooking with Chef Rika in five minutes!

programme.title: Doki Doki! NHK World-Japan
programme.desc: This time we introduce 'Journeys in Japan', which is a favourite of viewers abroad, and show an episode of it that visited Suzuka, one of the centres of motorsport in Japan.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. I want to see my owner again! Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 2-11.

programme.desc: A black kitty sits at a picturesque spot near the beach - two other kitties are busy greeting people at an old train station, but they always find time to play with the station staff.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Wheelchair Exercises'. The twins help Mr Rosen do his wheelchair exercises, then decorate a surprise get well gift.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica'. A feather duster drama unfolds high in the Monteverde Cloud Forest when Glitch's feather collecting goes wrong. Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - First Aid Waffle'. Waffle's paw is hurt in class, so vet Jess trains Mr Nolan in doggy first aid. Doug invents a device with buttons that Waffle can press for entertainment if he gets bored resting.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E17 - Recycling Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing recycling machines: a recycling truck, a recycling materials handler and a rubbish collection boat.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Sound Snatcher'. A strange flying creature visits the Clangers' planet and starts eating up any music it can find - until the sounds of the Hoot Planet prove too much for it to swallow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E14 - Puppies'. The Teletubbies walk about in a huddle, before watching a girl with lots of puppies.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - Upsy Daisy, Igglepiggle, the Bed and the Ball'. Enter a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. Upsy Daisy is asleep in her bed when the ball bounces into the garden, waking her up.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - The Tap Shoes'. When football is cancelled, chooses to help Kobi tidy the shed rather than join Bella and Sam at dance class. Kobi hopes that a discovery in the 'Kobi cave' will convince Mali that dance is for everyone.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Cake'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'cake' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's sticky cake, a sprinkles cake and even a muddy looking cake!

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Earth Explorers
programme.desc: 'S8/E22 - Earth Is Round'. Nina investigates how we know the Earth is round, with the help of Luke - her sight neuron.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Pontipine Children In Tombliboo's Trousers'. Enter a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. The Pontipine children play a game of jumping in the Tombliboos' trousers.

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Fast and Slow'. Kit and Pup are on a roller coaster. When the roller coaster goes up the slope can you see if it's moving fast or slow?

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Fruit'. Pup has been shopping for fruit, but whenever he puts the fruit in a bowl it keeps disappearing. Who could be taking the fruit?

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Hair'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'hair' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see all different types of hair - brown hair, pink hair and even dogs with funny hair!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animals
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Jumping'. Andy Day looks at a selection of baby animals as they learn valuable jumping skills, from the springbok and the jerboa to the arctic fox.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Scrumping'. Shaun's attempts to get his hands on some apples soon escalates into all-out war between sheep and pigs.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E21'. Thomas is in China and has been asked to take a water wheel to the paddy fields.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Postman Pat and the Karaoke Night'. The children of Greendale have been practicing for 'Karaoke Night' and cannot wait for it to be time to sing.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E15'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Numberblocks Express'. All aboard for a riotous railway ride as the Numberblocks try to stop a runaway train.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Postman Pat and the Amazing Weather Machine'. Ajay's organised a Summer Special Day on the Green but the sun is too hot. Ted's invention, a weather machine, might save the day!

programme.desc: 'S2/E16'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Pet Sitters'. The twins pet-sit their friend Kerry's guinea pigs, Poppy and Bailey, but the animals escape.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S23/E16'. A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bike'. Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Bob Bilby'. When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to show him a good time.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S3/E27 - The Game Show Badge'. The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Postman Pat and The Spring Lamb'. Pat has his hands full today as he tries to delivery his special delivery to the school and find a brand new lamb on Greendale Fell at the same time!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Postman Pat and The Painted Sheep'. It's all hands to the deck as Pat and Jess try to deliver special cans of blue dye to Alf.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Food Machines'. Motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing food machines!

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Three-Wheeled Machines'. Catie tests out three amazing machines that have three wheels: a motor trike, the fastest electric motorbike in the world and a tiny car.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Catch Me If You Can'. The animals are napping but Raa Raa and Ooo Ooo are wide awake and want to play.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - Emergency Rescue'. Mrs Higley-Pigley's cat is stuck in a tree, but Dad and Mr Fen are unable to help.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E44 - Broken Vase'. The twins and their friend Tony Welch accidentally break a vase and try to fix it themselves.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Zoo'. Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E5'. Sandy and Seaweed have invented a new game knocking down bottles with coconuts, they have called it 'Bowling'.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E6'. Captain Captain decides she needs a break from Sandy and Seaweed and books a holiday.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Backpackers'. Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - It's Time to Visit a Maze'. JoJo and Gran Gran visit a maze and see their friends Alfie and Ellie. They race towards the centre of the maze, but JoJo can't seem to figure out how to get there.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Waffles Playdate'. Gramps, Evie and Waffle arrive home with Ruby and Jelly for a playdate just as a thousand, accidentally ordered, toilet rolls are delivered to Mrs Hobbs' house next door.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Postman Pat and The Flying Shark'. It's an extra special delivery for Pat and Jess when they have to deliver a giant inflatable shark in time for Sealife Awareness Day at the school.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Tag's First Day'. The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Libby has made a mini golf course out of cardboard in the shared garden. Libby tries to instruct her Mum on how to navigate the course but ends up confusing herself.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S5/E13'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'slippers' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. This episode is all about slippers - green slippers, blue slippers, little slippers and big slippers.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Racing Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing racing machines: a racing powerboat, a winged stock car and a super-fast racing plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Postman Pat and The Blue Flash'. Pat needs to deliver an extra special delivery to the school today - The Blue Flash superhero character!

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E16'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E21'. In Hong Kong discover how to create a brilliant bottle bird and a tropical big picture.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Junk Letter'. Mister Maker discovers how lots of old junk can make a junk letter, and sees if he can make a dinky drum in a minute.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - It's Time to Play Basketball'. JoJo and Gran Gran run into Jared and Cynthia who are playing basketball. JoJo joins in, but she doesn't feel like she is tall enough to play it well.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 - Raa Raa Gets Hiccups'. Raa Raa can't get rid of his hiccups. Can his friends help him?

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Watery Paint Patterns'. Mister Maker tries to make a noisy croaking frog in just one minute, and the Mini Makers have fun at the fair.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E65 - Eye Test'. Tim is waiting to be picked up from school but no one has arrived, so Mr Morris takes him to the school office.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Postman Pat and The Clippy Claws'. Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E21'. Thomas is in China and has been asked to take a water wheel to the paddy fields.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. JoJo and Gran Gran visit the busy market to buy fish and end up helping their friends. JoJo learns that the market is like a family - the people there are kind and look out for each other.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - Rescue Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing rescue machines: a heavy recovery vehicle, a fire ladder truck and a firefighting super tanker.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E55 - School Shoes'. The youngsters are pleased with their new school shoes, and even stomp around wearing them!

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Who's the Caddy?'. After finding his old golf clubs, the Farmer puts out his back and is forced to stay indoors , so Shaun takes the chance to learn how to play.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S2/E14'. Love Monster finds a baby koala very difficult to babysit.

programme.title: Swashbuckle

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E9 - Jennifer Shanbrom & Matt Fletcher'. A beloved police officer's murder will take years for his brothers in blue to solve, ultimately revealing a conspiracy born out of lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E10 - Patricia Teeter & Steven Brown'. A shocking double murder and kidnapping springs police into action to stop a pair of deadly lovers before they can kill again.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Death By Miracle Cure'. Detectives in Colorado investigate a naturopathic doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Murder Of Gagandip Singh'. When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths?

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Beyond The Grave'. Kelly and her team head to Pascagoula, Mississippi to figure out if the tragic shooting death of a young man was an accident, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Home Alone'. In Hope, Arkansas, Kelly and her team investigate the murder of a young mother who was brutally executed in her home.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Michel Fourniret And Monique Olivier'. Michel Fourniret, who confessed to the kidnap, rape and murder of nine girls over 14 years. His wife, Monique Olivier, exposed him after fearing her own conviction.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Death By Miracle Cure'. Detectives in Colorado investigate a naturopathic doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Young And Deadly'. A young aspiring actress falls madly in love with her sophisticated, older boss. But his toxic love manipulates her into becoming his puppet.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Teenage Mistake'. A high school freshman falls in love for the first time when she meets an edgy 18-year-old troublemaker and she's desperate to show him her love has no bounds.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Unholy Matrimony'. A young woman committed to her faith is lured in by the idea of holy matrimony, but she soon learns that her man of God is no saint.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Bullets On Bourbon Street'. A beautiful young bartender is swept off her feet by a charismatic up-and-coming rapper. But when a night out takes a violent turn, she sacrifices everything to protect him.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E23 - Secret Life Of Paige Birgfeld'. Featuring the story of how Paige Birgfeld's family got a call telling them she was missing in 2008, but no-one was prepared for the revelations the investigation would unearth.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Last Afterparty'. Exiting the upscale Manhattan night club at 3am, 26 year old Joey, informs his crew he's going to an afterparty with a handful of people he just met, never to be heard from again.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Murder At The MET'. With 2000 audience members watching a ballet at the Metropolitan Opera House, orchestra violinist Helen takes a break and leaves her 20 thousand dollar violin on her chair, never to return.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Deadly Spell'. Mama Edna, is adored by all as the matriarch of East Flatbush. When she is found murdered in her home, NYPD uncover a Voodoo practice that leads them to a web of the unthinkable.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Staten Island Secrets'. A tight knit Orthodox Jewish community is terrified when police respond to a mother's 911 call from her ransacked house, to break down the bedroom door of her daughter, Aliza, to find her dead.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Broken Pride'. When devoted girlfriends are murderously attacked in their Brooklyn home, the NYPD doubts the surviving partner's story. These suspicions anger the LGBTQ community who demand the real killer be found.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Deadly Diploma'. When a lie spins out of control, a celebration turns into a family's worst nightmare. A chilling 9-11 call tells one side of the story, but investigators uncover a shocking twist.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Collateral Damage'. When a young Marine goes missing, NCIS agents uncover a tragic mystery that stuns a Virginia Beach naval base. How can an online love affair result in the murder of an innocent?

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Bevers'. Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Carrs'. The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - David Cook'. After murdering a teacher, David Cook was released from prison after 21 years. Tragically, just three years later, he strangled a pensioner to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Dream Killer'. Kent Heitholt, a sports editor in Columbia, Missouri, was found bludgeoned and strangled on the night of Halloween in 2001. Two years later, a much-needed tip on the case arrived.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E2 - Show Me The Money'. Featuring the story of bank manager Michelle Renee, whose life was turned upside down when three masked gunmen burst into her home and took her family hostage.

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - David Cook'. After murdering a teacher, David Cook was released from prison after 21 years. Tragically, just three years later, he strangled a pensioner to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E4 - Deadly Proposal'. University professor Stephanie Pepper Sims vanished in early January 2003, but what did her husband David and her lover, Wayne Guidry, Jr. know about her disappearance?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Dream Killer'. Kent Heitholt, a sports editor in Columbia, Missouri, was found bludgeoned and strangled on the night of Halloween in 2001. Two years later, a much-needed tip on the case arrived.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E6 - Duty, Death & Dishonor'. Army specialist Richard Davis survived the Second Iraq War but vanished on his return to America. Though the Army listed him as absent without leave, his father thought otherwise.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Blood Is Thicker Than Water'. After divorce, a single mother didn't expect to find love again, but a charming stranger wins her heart. Desperate to keep his love, she'd do anything to prove her loyalty.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - A Deadly Inheritance'. Kelly and her team head to Polk County, Oregon to figure out the mysterious disappearance of a man who vanished from his home without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Beyond The Grave'. Kelly and her team head to Pascagoula, Mississippi to figure out if the tragic shooting death of a young man was an accident, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E3 - The Untold Story Of Caylee Anthony'. The trial of Casey Anthony for her daughter's murder captivated the American public. In this programme, three of her defense lawyers discuss the shocking case.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Dimmed Broadway Lights'. At only 17, Catherine left hometown Ohio to come to New York with a dream of dancing on Broadway. Three short years later she is found viciously stabbed to death in her Manhattan apartment.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Hudson River Horror'. A single mum, who is pregnant with her second child, says goodnight to her 12 year old daughter in their Brooklyn home at midnight. By morning she is found dead miles away in the Hudson River.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Pizza Man Murdered'. When a beloved owner of a famous Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the front pages buzz with mafia theories, while the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Heat Of Deceit'. When an arsonist's personal demons ignite a series of deadly fires, a horrifying secret life is ultimately revealed.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Mr. Right Is Deadly Wrong'. A fairy tale romance turns into a deadly nightmare when a husband's secret past surfaces.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Rosas'. After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years.

programme.title: Descent Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Randy Kraft'. Randy Kraft known as the Scorecard Killer, the Southern California Strangler, and the Freeway Killer, raped, tortured, and murdered a minimum of sixteen young men between 1972 and 1983.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of Yang Liu, a Chinese trader who was killed for his money by his supposed friend, Ming Jang.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E7 - The Highest Stakes'. A 27-year-old woman from Sacramento, California went to a casino to gamble and then vanished. What happened to Christie Wilson and her family when the unthinkable took place?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E8 - Who Killed The Newlyweds'. The wedding pictures of Dyke and Karen Rhoads show a joyous young couple, but their lives came to a violent end when a fire engulfed their home on July 6th, 1986.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E26 - Defending Your Life'. This is the troubling tale of Jerry Jones Jr. who was tried three times for the murder of his wife. But to this day, he and his two daughters still profess his innocence.

programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Daddy Dropoff'. It's Dad's turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school, but Bluey and Bingo are not going to make it easy to get there on time.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - River Rescue/ Big Tread'. Bo fails to watch a young wee-hicle, and they both end up stuck on a raft in the creek. Piston must overcome his fears of mythical monster trucks to save his lost friends.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E86'. With the PJ Masks' help, Newton learns that he's not just brains! After his experience with Romeo, Newton has sworn off fighting villains.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Gallymoggers Granola / Sour Grapes'. When Hattie disappears from overeating granola, Alice must bring him back! Rosa attends her first Great Grape Picnic, where she tries new foods with Alice and friends' help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E94 - Musical Mission Mishap'. When Bob can't come up with a design for his and Ana's wedding cake, the pugs and Lollie go on a mission to gather up cake ideas! The pugs and Lollie search for Ana's beret.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E95 - Pups in the Wild'. When Ana runs out of fabric for her wedding dress, the pugs set out to find the matching fabric! The pugs go on a mission to find Bob a pink manta ray in the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E59 - Sleeping Spino/ Mr. Careful'. Tiny wants to help the dinos get along so she invents a game to pair one dino with another. Mount Oblivion seems like it's going to blow, Mazu needs to find her book to stop it.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E60 - Brother Bill/ Tricksteratops'. Bill starts to feel like his sister might like Rocky more than him! Missy is good at magic tricks so they encourage her to do a magic show.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E61 - Council of Wise Dinos/ Rockatastrophe'. When a spot opens on the Council, Mazu applies. Rocky becomes so fixated on 'helping' that he doesn't stop and think first about what he is doing.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E62 - The Bravest/ the Sleepover'. Bill realizes bravery is doing something you're afraid of to help someone else. When one of Mazu's science experiments backfires, the dinos have to evacuate the den for the night.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - Never Enough Henrys, Roddy the Hero'. Henry needs to be in three places at once so creates more Henrys using Cobby's Copytron. Can Henry help Roddy prove he's up to being the new scout leader?

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Working Monster, Denzel Moves Away'. Mama is to be Roarsville's official music maker so everyone must help at home. Henry thinks Denzel is moving away so plans a party for his best friend.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E47 - Ivor's Birthday Bash, Huggle Bubbles'. Henry plans Ivor's first birthday party then realises it's what he, not Ivor, would like. It's Spring Cleaning Day and there are lots of bubbles!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E49'. The two monster families get competitive on a snow day. Will Santa Claws arrive in time for Henry's festive TV show?

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E54 - Bubble Bill / the Perfect Bone'. When Bill realizes just how indestructible weird fish bubbles are, he decides to live inside one. Rugo and Ignatius each find the same, 'perfect,' semicircle-shaped bone.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - Adventures in Egg Sitting / Rainbow's End'. The four little dinos are tasked with watching Hegan's eggs, which are soon to hatch. When the dinos learn about a treasure at the end of a rainbow, Rocky is determined to find it!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Carried Away, Monster in Charge'. Talent contest The Grr Factor is in town. Henry wants Daddo to demonstrate his juggling. Momma and Daddo leave Cobby to babysit and the power goes to his head.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Halloween Scramble/Scouts Night Out'. Henry's excited about the Halloween parade and hopes to get a Hugglebar from the Treats Balloon. But the balloon blows away and it's up to Henry to save the day.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E54 - Bubble Bill / the Perfect Bone'. When Bill realizes just how indestructible weird fish bubbles are, he decides to live inside one. Rugo and Ignatius each find the same, 'perfect,' semicircle-shaped bone.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Magic Xylophone'. As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone (that has the power to freeze Dad in space and time) Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hospital'. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy Uppy around the house with their last balloon, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Daddy Robot'. Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it for them. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions with disastrous results.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Shadowlands'. On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Weekend'. At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset, when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - BBQ'. It's lunchtime on Bluey's back deck! But every BBQ needs a side salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of pepper her cousins want!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Horsey Ride'. Bluey, Bingo and their cousins make Dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of Horsey Ride.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Order Up! / Teeny-tiny Venture'. Hattie and Fergie use teacup carts to deliver bakery orders while getting into friendly competition. Alice and Rosa shrink before Rosa's Knighting Ceremony.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - A Big Giant Problem!'. Mickey, and friends travel to Cloud Kingdom to see if Willie the Giant knows why it hasn't rained. On Razzle Dazzle Day, Donald makes a wish with a genie to win all the prizes.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bike'. Bluey's struggling to ride her bike. But inspired by her friends, she refuses to give up.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Bob Bilby'. It's Bingo's turn with Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet and she's going to show him a good time!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Spy Game'. Spy Game: A game in the park goes haywire when Bingo stops playing. Now Bluey must win her back.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Five minutes feels like an eternity as Dad and the kids wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing Butterflies in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alice's Stormy Afternoon / Into the Tulgey Wood'. Alice makes a treat for the baby buds, but goes overboard with a special ingredient. Rosa's first camping trip goes awry when her guards follow.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Snurfy Murphy/New Rock on the Block'. It's warm in Rocky Falls and it causes Murphy to 'snurf,' a hiccup-like habit unique to mammoths. Eureka volunteers to move a mysterious meteorite out of the town before sunset.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E123 - The Power of Mystery Mountain / the Power of Mystery Mountain Part Ii'. Mystery Mountain breaks out of its dimension and floats over the city.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E124 - Slow and Sneaky / the Pj Riders Save the Day'. Romeo challenges Carly and Cartoka to a race, but it's all part of a sneaky plan to steal speed crystals. The PJ Riders are jealous when the PJs plan to restore their vehicles.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E126 - Trick or Treat/ Trick or Treat Part 2'. Orticia gets carried away by tricking, not treating - resulting in mild Halloween horror.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E129 - Heroes of the Road/ Heroes of the Road Part 2'. The PJ Masks can't wait to use their PJ Vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But as a result, they don't work well with Newton or their PJ Animals.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E130 - Heroes of the Road Part Iii/ Heroes of the Road Part 4'. The PJMs can't wait to use their vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But they don't work well with Newton.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Stop Doc Ock'. Doc Ock sends her favorite octo-bot, CAL, to infiltrate WEB-Quarters with a new invention. Spidey reminds Hulk to use self-control after Rhino challenges him to a strength contest.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Snurfy Murphy/New Rock on the Block'. It's warm in Rocky Falls and it causes Murphy to 'snurf,' a hiccup-like habit unique to mammoths. Eureka volunteers to move a mysterious meteorite out of the town before sunset.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. JoJo comes down with the Upsie-Dodo-Downsies! Alice must find a recipe that helps her feel better. Hattie and Fergie lose the recipe card for a royal dish.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Maybe I'm a Maze'. Legendary pirate Captain Salty Bones invites Mickey, Minnie, and friends to join the biggest treasure hunt ever and see if they can be true pirates!

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - River Rescue/ Big Tread'. Bo fails to watch a young wee-hicle, and they both end up stuck on a raft in the creek. Piston must overcome his fears of mythical monster trucks to save his lost friends.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cliffhanger/ the Very First Fire'. Iggy and Rod fall onto a narrow ledge and The Buds must learn to do things the safe way in order to rescue them. A park play fort catches fire and Bo knows The Buds can put it out.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cookie's Day Off / Picture Furfect'. When Cookie's beach trip is cancelled due to weather, Alice brings the beach to her! Fergie's upset he couldn't stay pristine for his family picture so Alice cheers him up.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E110 - Unicorse'. Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E111 - Curry Quest'. When they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park, Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E112 - Magic'. Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule - never use magic for cheekiness!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E113 - Chest'. Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E114 - Sheepdog'. Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest. But looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E115 - Housework'. Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but it never happens and they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E90'. Desperate to prove himself, Gekko recruits Armadylan for extra training. Catboy wants to increase his speed... but in doing so, drains power from his friends.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cookie's Day Off / Picture Furfect'. When Cookie's beach trip is cancelled due to weather, Alice brings the beach to her! Fergie's upset he couldn't stay pristine for his family picture so Alice cheers him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E96 - The Sunshine Pups'. When Ana's ring rolls down the sink, the Pugs set out to recover it. Bingo, Rolly, and Bob find themselves stranded in the middle of nowhere on Bob and Ana's wedding day!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Hawaii Pug-Oh/A. R. F.'. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii in search of sand. Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog programmed to clean up their mess.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Book Friction'. Grab two of your favourite books and shuffle their pages together. Now, try to pull them apart again. Does it work?

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Dishwasher And Table'. Find out how familiar everyday objects from the world around us are made and work, such as kitchen dishwasher machines and tables.

programme.title: Mindworks Clips
programme.desc: 'S1/E83 - Storing Memory'. A close look at how we store information in our brains, and discover why we are more likely to remember negative events.

programme.title: Mindworks Clips
programme.desc: 'S1/E84 - The Limbic System and Emotion'. Explore the relationship between the limbic system and emotion, and discover which fruit triggers the growth of new brain cells.

programme.title: Mindworks Clips
programme.desc: 'S1/E85 - The Power of Colour'. Discover how different colours can affect your mood.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Could We Do Without Plankton?'. Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - What Does Space Sound Like?'. Sound waves require a medium to travel through. Since space is a big empty void, there can't be sound waves in space.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Thermal Image Cameras'. Host Alie Ward presents a chef cooking with science, a stress-relieving wrist band, a heat imaging device and an alarm clock rug.

programme.title: Jolly Jesters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Knights'. In the Middle Ages, not everyone can become a knight! Little Lewis follows every step required to accomplish his dream of becoming one.

programme.title: Bajillionaires
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Office Life'. The team struggles to fit into their new corporate offices and the kids realise they'd rather be back working together in the old garage.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - A Healthy Digital Detox'. Using the Internet too much can create a kind of addiction and be bad for your health. It's essential to make time for other things too.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Brainy Artifical Intelligence'. Scientists are trying to create computers that can think like humans, known as artificial intelligence.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - True or False?'. With all the information circulating on the Internet, it can be hard to tell the difference between a hoax and something real.

programme.title: Xploration DIY SCI
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Fluids'. In this episode host Steve Spangler shows how to walk on water. He also explores the question: What is a fluid?

programme.title: Marvellous Makes
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Snappy Creature'. Grab some bottle tops and a piece of card. We'll show you how to make these clackety castanet characters.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Giant Leech'. The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It likes eating worms, which it slurps like spaghetti.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Happy Turkey Day'. The Wild Kratts are on a mission to defend the honour of the wild turkey and to stop Gourmand, who is hunting for the fattest turkey.

programme.title: Dogs With Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Rescuers'. From searching for survivors when disaster strikes to rescuing animals at risk, dogs come to the rescue in surprising ways.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Fluorescent Beetles'. Night time in the wild can look peaceful, but around the termite mounds the fluorescent beetle larvae are catching dinner with their light.

programme.title: The Pet Rescuers
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - One Step at a Time'. In this episode, Charlie continues his fight for life. Homer is having an ultrasound and two Labradors have to leave their home.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - How Did the Leopard Get its Spots?'. Mathematician and cryptographer Alan Turing came up with a chemical theory of morphogenesis to explain why leopards have spots.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Why Are Plants So Green?'. The chlorophyll in plants reflects the green wavelengths of sunlight back to us. This process gives plants their green appearance.

programme.title: Animal Embassy
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Frederica the Turtle'. Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy and Loro Parque has offered to be her 'forever home' Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Sloth Moths'. For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites to algae to a colony of sloth moths.

programme.title: Amazing Animal Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - A Friend in Need'. This episode follows a schnauzer obsessed with a guinea pig and a ram who wants to be a cow.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Pitcher Plants'. The carnivorous pitcher plants have evolved to trap and digest insects, which it lures in with sweet nectar.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Why is the Sky Blue?'. The sun emits radiant energy called electromagnetic radiation. The blue sky we see is a form of this energy.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Cordyceps'. Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They take over the insect's body and can steer its mind.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Industrial Era'. Rafael, Mona and Nabi discover that Severini was a Futurist who used machine parts in his artwork 'Industrial Era'.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - The Day Off'. Matilda and her family visit the beach. Matilda takes the day off cooking so her sisters prepare a barbecue.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - The Number One Sport'. Matilda and her family learn how to play American football and attend cheerleader training. Matilda cooks food to celebrate the game.

programme.title: Jolly Jesters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Hygiene in The Middle Ages'. Eager to freshen up a little, Howler walks us through the typical medieval 'beauty routine'.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Food Goes Green'. Danni discovers how microscopic bacteria can create organic fertilizer. She explores ocean farming and a cool new method of refrigeration.

programme.title: Innovation
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Safe To Fly'. Heathrow Airport is developing a new way to analyze security information. The system known as 'TASS' brings together various data sources.

programme.title: Innovation
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Robot Ship Inspectors'. The maintenance of seafaring ships is laborious and costly. Scientists have now come up with a way to save time and money on this task.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Black Square Serigraph'. Rafael, Mona and Nabi learn that Kasimir Malevitch wanted to take abstract art to the limit with his work 'Black Square Serigraph'.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Character'. Nabi thinks the picture 'Character' by Chaissac looks like it was painted by a child, but Rafael and Mona like his use of recycled material.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Woman'. Jean Arp was fascinated by round, natural shapes. Mona thinks that his collage 'Woman' looks just like her Uncle Joe.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Mercury Passing in Front of the Sun'. Futurist artist Giacomo Balla loved science, colour and light. Rafael, Mona and Nabi look at his work 'Mercury Passing in Front of the Sun'.

programme.title: Innovation
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Smart Irrigation Bears Fruit'. The new irrigation system 'Waterbee' knows exactly how much water any crop needs to be fully grown by the day it is picked.

programme.title: Innovation
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Shocking Olives'. A Spanish company has developed a new way to extract olive oil. By 'shocking' the olives with an electrical pulse, more oil is extracted.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Gentle Event'. Kandinsky was the father and master of abstract art. Mona and Nabi look at his painting 'Gentle Event' and learn how it was created.

programme.title: Food - Delicious Science
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - We Are What We Eat'. The chemistry of our food fuels and builds our bodies. Everything we eat feeds our cells and nourishes our brain.

programme.title: Did You Know?
programme.desc: 'S6 - Developing IQ and Intelligence'. Is the IQ test a real measure of intelligence? How was the test developed? Find out now.

programme.title: Pay Attention To God
programme.desc: There is no one on this earth without limitation. Limitation makes our Christian life, our journey more valuable and gives us more reason to pay attention to God. Get a rightful focus as you listen to Prophet T.B. Joshua's message.

programme.title: Where Is Your Faith?
programme.desc: Around the world today, millions of prayers are prayed with almost no faith. See yourself clearly in this message as you can be a man of prayer but perhaps not a man of faith.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Ecuador
programme.desc: T.B Joshua and the Emmanuel TV reach out in love, donating a school and facilities to the Chachi people of the remote San Salvador community in Ecuador after an earthquake damaged the main school for their community.

programme.title: A Time Of Prayer
programme.desc: Position yourself to receive, as you pray along with TB Joshua, in this special time of prayer.

programme.title: Standard For Life

programme.title: Another Ministry: Ghana

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Delta'. Sue visits the beautiful mangroves of the Sundarbans, home of the Bengal tiger, and meets the villagers who live in fear of an attack.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
Cornwall With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Simon Reeve travels through glorious Cornwall during a summer like no other, as the county emerges from lockdown and businesses are in a race to survive.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Fresh Starts'. On the hunt for a steady supply of dog food, Becky and family establish a 'Fish Camp' on the shores of Great Slave Lake.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Record Breaking Rollercoaster'. The world's tallest roller coaster is in Los Angeles' Six Flags Amusement Park, which was inspired by scenic railways and steam catapults on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Cambodia'. Ben Fogle travels to Cambodia to live with a fellow Brit who is raising his own castaway tribe on a tropical island.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Super Senses'. Steve goes in search of Deadly Predators with the greatest super-senses on earth. From echolocating bats to supersonic whales, and a snake that sees its prey in complete darkness.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland with a visit to a glacier, a trip to the island of Heimay which was nearly destroyed by a volcanic eruption in the 1970s.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Brink Of Winter'. Sue Aikens must hunt for caribou before they disappear from the tundra. Jessie Holmes scouts his new land for future hunting grounds.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Life And Death'. Ricko DeWilde races against the freeze to fortify the family cabin. The Hailstones scout the land for seasonal resources. Sue Aikens must repair vital safety equipment before tundra storms arrive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Taking Chances'. Andy Bassich and Denise Becker attempt a harvest that isn't usually available this time of year. Iriqtaiq Hailstone sets out to help her sisters and to teach her son a native skill.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - The Other Side'. Ricko DeWilde travels to cursed lands to finally lay his brother's spirit to rest. Sue Aikens ventures into the tundra to map the shifting landscape.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Into the Night'. Sue Aikens must protect Kavik from the dangers that lurk in the shadows. The Hailstones use the cover of night to search for food under the ice.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Coasts'. Coasts are the most changeable and challenging of ocean habitats, but along with great danger they also offer great riches.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Our Blue Planet'. Human life has had a devastating impact on our oceans, but is it too late to save them? In this episode, scientists share their latest discoveries and reveal what the future holds for our oceans.

programme.title: Blue Planet II: Oceans of Wonder
programme.desc: This extended special of the nature documentary series journeys from the equator to the unexplored depths, meeting the best-loved characters from the series.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E2'. The story of the Marsh Pride continues with testimony from those who filmed them, those who tried to protect them and those who hunted them.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Martin climbs an active volcano in Vanuatu, and in Tonga meets a third gender leiti and a princess. In Fiji he visits a tribe tricked out of their homeland by a British mining company.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. In Texas and Mexico, the first Atlantic hurricane of the season makes landfall, creating dangerous flooding and widespread destruction. A tornado outbreak unleashes carnage on Oklahoma, Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Martin climbs an active volcano in Vanuatu, and in Tonga meets a third gender leiti and a princess. In Fiji he visits a tribe tricked out of their homeland by a British mining company.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. In Texas and Mexico, the first Atlantic hurricane of the season makes landfall, creating dangerous flooding and widespread destruction. A tornado outbreak unleashes carnage on Oklahoma, Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - New Zealand'. Ben journeys off the coast of New Zealand's North Island to Great Barrier Island, where he meets a man who gave up his promising scientific career to embrace life in an off-grid, secluded world.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Spain'. Ben heads to a remote corner of Spain's Andalucían mountains to meet British couple Alan and Lorna, who have left their respective careers in Brighton to become alpaca farmers.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E1 of 2'. Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border, in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she discovers an unexpected invasion of migrants.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E2 of 2'. Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso, Texas. She meets Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso as her husband is stuck in Juarez.

programme.title: Attenborough's Wonder Of Song
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. Sir David Attenborough tunes in to the remarkable sounds of the natural world, an open-air festival of songs of procreation and survival. But will they soon be heard no more?

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E2'. The story of the Marsh Pride continues with testimony from those who filmed them, those who tried to protect them and those who hunted them.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Maltloaf'. Gregg Wallace sees how maltloaf is produced on a mass-scale.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alexander witnesses a volcanic eruption, visits the original geyser, learns about the Icelandic belief in elves, takes a trip to an unusual museum and meets an Icelandic rock band.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Volcano expert Chris Horsley is called back to the Congo to investigate a potentially lethal threat to over two-million people. After a recent eruption, a huge 10-mile-long fracture has appeared in the ground.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Voices Of The Dead
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Using the latest geological and forensic research, Bettany reveals a blow-by-blow sequence of events as Vesuvius erupts, culminating in the tragic and shocking deaths of our characters.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Maltloaf'. Gregg Wallace sees how maltloaf is produced on a mass-scale.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.
