programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Let's Get Cozy!'. Molly Yeh is making hearty foods to keep her family warm. They include comforting chicken and dumpling soup with decadent no knead salami bread.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Practice On The Farm'. Molly Yeh makes a Midwest-Italian inspired feast. The tasty menu includes spaghetti and juicy meatballs and charred broccolini on creamy homemade ricotta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S22/E8 - Sweet, Savory, And Saucy'. In Bakersfield, Guy has some meaty Texas chilli and decadent pumpkin pancakes. Then in Phoenix, he finds a gourmet taco spot mixing up a mean mole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E11 - Turkey-Giving'. Guy Fieri prepares for Turkey Day! In Princeton, NJ, rapper Rev. Run jumps in for crepes and a New Hampshire cafe cooks up terrific turkey meatloaf.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E8 - Carnival Games'. Four chefs compete in carnival games to determine what they can cook with, what their budgets are and where they can shop while preparing next-level carnival food.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Comfort And Joy'. The five remaining bakers ignite the holiday spirit with a fiery dessert. Then they take a traditional holiday cheese board and turn it into an unusual cheesecake.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E4 - Grudge Match: Battle 3'. Four champs who were previously defeated return to the kitchen, hungry for sweet redemption. Sardines are the main protein in the appetiser basket.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Chengdu'. From the blistering 'hot pot' and fiery mapo tofu to spicy kung pao chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes of Chengdu, China.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Tea For Three'. Molly Yeh celebrates Mother's Day with a sprinkle-filled tea party! She makes rose cupcake scones and fairy toast with marzipan butter and homemade sprinkles.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - BBQ Housewarming For Mom'. Molly Yeh makes a housewarming dinner of Midwest-Jewish mashups. The menu includes her barbeque brisket sandwich and rugelach cookie salad for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Nick's The Man'. For Father's Day, Molly Yeh whips up the creamiest dishes around! She makes sausage chicken alfredo lasagne and chocolate dipped strawberry krumkake cannoli.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Ladies' Painting Party'. Molly Yeh makes a spread of colourful dishes for a painting party on the farm! The menu includes her pork meatball banh mi sandwiches and terrazzo jelly cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - Tour De Grand Forks'. It's a day of delicious food on the farm! Molly Yeh makes her big fluffy pancakes and sausage for breakfast and then yummy picnic food for lunch.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - Late-Night Munchies'. Nick has a band gig downtown and Molly Yeh makes a hearty cheeseburger potato soup to celebrate. Then, Molly prepares a sinful spread of late-night munchies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - A Trade For A Trade'. Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, swap a trade for a trade! She teaches him how to make buttermilk doughnuts in exchange for a welding lesson.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Nick's Birthday TV Dinner'. Molly Yeh prepares a TV dinner-themed evening to celebrate Nick's birthday! She cooks bacon wrapped meatloaves and a delicious Battenberg birthday cake.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Winter Wonderland'. Casey Webb challenges three teams of bakers to create fantasy snow globe cakes that capture Christmas magic. They use ice sculpture to enhance the glitz!

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mrs Claus' Night Off'. Three teams of master festive bakers and their ice sculptors compete to show off a new side of Mrs. Claus in out-of-this-world cake designs and displays.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Christmas Eve'. The remaining baking teams and their ice sculptors create the ultimate night before Christmas cake display featuring Santa Claus, for the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, from a noodle house in San Diego to a neighbourhood bistro in New Orleans and an award-winning BBQ joint in Iowa.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate dining spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to meet an old buddy reeling in fresh poke. And in San Diego he visits a fresh fish market.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Taipei'. Andrew explores the edible icons of Taipei, Taiwan, a place where the dumplings can be dangerous and who you share the meal with is as important as the meal itself.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E10 - Anguish In Abilene'. In Abilene, Texas, Robert Irvine meets Texas Cowboy BBQ co-owners George and Taylor, whose restaurant and marriage is on the rocks.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Alex vs Noodles'. Three noodle experts from New York, California and New Jersey enter the arena. Can they knock chef Alex Guarnaschelli out of the competition?

programme.title: Big Bad Budget Battle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Leftover Lessons'. Host Ree Drummond challenges three home cooks to turn sandwiches into an inviting breakfast and transform dinner leftovers into new supper sensations.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E3 - Dog Days Of Summer'. The team enjoys dishes including elbow macaroni salad with pine puts. And, Chef Fabio Viviani stops by and makes bean salad with crispy mortadella bites.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E4 - A Kid-Friendly Feast'. The team serves up meals perfect for kids. On the menu are chicken meatball casserole with roasted broccoli, French toast kebabs and quinoa-crusted chicken.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Summer Block Party'. The gang is throwing summer block party! They prepare dishes including smoked drumsticks, shrimp, corn and bean salad and a pink lemonade cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Summer Block Party'. The gang is throwing summer block party! They prepare dishes including smoked drumsticks, shrimp, corn and bean salad and a pink lemonade cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E6 - Last Call For Summer'. The team is savouring the flavours of the summer with a French onion burger, BBQ cauliflower, sparkling pineapple punch, and pistachio-plum crisp.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Farm Brunch Anniversary'. Molly Yeh makes a special brunch for the family to celebrate her anniversary. The menu features shakshuka with feta and Brussels sprouts and bacon hash.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Farm Suppers'. Molly honours her early days on the farm with her most memorable suppers. Dishes include chicken hot pot, sweet cookie 'salad' and sausage and broccolini pizza pockets.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Baby Shower'. Molly makes a delicious buffet spread for her sister-in-law's baby shower. Her menu features meatless meatball sliders, 'walking' fish tacos and baked donuts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Chinese Family Faves'. Molly makes a range of family recipes to celebrate a visit from her dad. Dishes include scallion pancakes with maple carrot slaw, and sprinkles cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Girl's Brunch'. Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to her best brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. The menu includes mini quiches with peas and bacon and garlic lemon kale.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - New Farm Traditions'. Molly puts a fresh twist on classic farm lunch staples for a picnic. She serves up garlic and onion Challah bread, home-made hummus, and olive oil blondies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Mom Comes To Town'. Molly Yeh's mum visits from Chicago for garden planting and a campfire supper, which includes breakfast tacos, charred sweet corn salsa and raspberry marshmallows.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Entertaining The Girls'. Molly prepares a special menu to make ahead for her visiting girlfriends. Dishes include sticky rhubarb short ribs and whipped cheesecakes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Shanghai'. Andrew Zimmern explores the popular tastes of Shanghai, China, from creamy crab and savoury pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E11 - Gold Medal Games: Grand Finale'. The champions return for a shot at the $50,000 prize money. Their culinary skills are pushed to the limit, with very difficult challenges.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E12 - Pork On The Brain'. The chefs are given a cut of heritage-breed pork and some canned meat in the first round. And in round three, the chefs are provided with another unusual item.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E13 - You've Been Canned'. A canned product leaves one chef in an unusual predicament. And, the competitors must create dishes featuring octopus and molluscs.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E1 - Tacos And Tequila'. Four aspiring chefs create their best dishes using mystery ingredients for a panel of judges. It's fiesta time as they take on tacos and tequila-themed baskets.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E2 - Leftover Takeover'. The competitors must rescue foods normally thrown out in a leftovers competition. Half of a sandwich and a bottle of sweet liquid are amongst the ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Shanghai'. Andrew Zimmern explores the popular tastes of Shanghai, China, from creamy crab and savoury pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - San Antonio'. Andrew Zimmern showcases the Tex-Mex favourites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos, melt-in-the-mouth barbacoa and a giant chalupa burger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chiang Mai'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand, from coconut curry soup and a sausage with pork and chilli paste, to fish roasted in banana leaves.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Phnom Penh'. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine in Phnom Penh.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Cape Town'. Andrew Zimmern samples the cuisine of Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city is also known for seafood.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Mauritius'. From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavourful fusions of Mauritius.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E6 - Quick And Easy Sweet Treats'. Ree cooks up some sweet treats in her kitchen! She makes a puff pastry braid with nuts and chocolate and her irresistible four-berry chimichangas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E8 - Super Easy Italian'. Ree Drummond serves up simple dishes with an Italian spin. First up, she makes Italian beef sandwiches followed by a spaghetti pizza pie and mozzarella sticks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E9 - What To Bring'. Ree celebrates Thanksgiving with delicious dishes to take to holiday parties. She makes caramelized onion and white cheddar mac and pumpkin scones with coffee glaze.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Attitude Of Gratitude'. It's a holiday pantry raid as nine bakers create canned fruit desserts! Later they make Thanksgiving pies with heartfelt messages on top.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Christmas Cookie Games'. Five talented cookie makers play a game of opposites with Christmas cookie designs. And, they create edible 3-D board games that Ree and Eddie can play!

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Worst Christmas Ever'. Paige Davis challenges three bakers to use their sense of humour and make their best gingerbread creations while envisioning the worst Christmas ever.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Canine Christmas'. Three bakers are challenged to make gingerbread showpieces that tell quite a 'tail.' And, they create holiday treats to prove the bite is as big as their bark.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Santa's Day Off'. Three bakers use their own specialities to make gingerbread showpieces that depict Santa enjoying a much-needed day off. Which competitor will make it to the final?

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mega Yards'. In the South Korean shipyards of Okpo and Sungdong, two teams are building a giant tanker - the Maersk Tangier - along with the world's biggest jack-up rig - the XLE4.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Upgrade And Upsell'. Andy's vision for big ideas leads to opportunity for the shop. If he achieves the build, he could secure years of future business - with a bit help from his dad.

programme.title: Through The Wormhole With Morgan...
programme.desc: 'Through The Wormhole With Morgan Freeman. S4/E10 - Will Sex Go Extinct?'. Human reproduction is about to undergo a dramatic revolution, as technology is close to making artificial wombs possible. Will sex become extinct?

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold

programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Small Tire Shootout'. Chuck puts on a Small Tire Shootout in OKC, where the fastest small tire cars from the surrounding area will race each other for a 2,000 dollar prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - It's Good To Be The Chief'. Big Chief sets his sights on finally claiming the number one spot. Meanwhile, Varley upgrades the Gold Car and tries to make it back on the top ten list.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Down From Chi-Town'. Oklahoma City's fastest take on the trash-talking street racers from Chicago. When many of the races get rained out, both sides agree to a rematch in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Pain In The Neck'. A Green Beret is dropped unprepared into Transylvania, where he's at risk from starvation and hypothermia. Even worse, he has more than one mouth to feed.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Mayan Sacrifice'. John is immersed in a pitch black maze of underwater caves in Mexico's Yucatan peninsula, where he battles exhaustion and hypothermia in neck-deep water.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Island Of Death'. The Dudes drop Jake in the jungles of Death Island in Nicaragua. There are tons of resources for a master tinkerer like him, but there are also snakes and crocodiles.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Quake, Rattle, And Roll'. Kevin and Grant build a homemade hydrofoil. Can they make it go so fast it glides over the water? The guys also learn if you can cook a steak with music.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - BB Comes To Play'. Baby Ball comes to play, but he's no longer the timid little ball Noddy remembers. Now he's BB and full of bounce. Noddy has an idea to keep him busy by knocking down the Skittles.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Olivia The Firefighter'. A firefighter's visit to Olivia's classroom inspires Olivia and her friends to become make-believe firefighters themselves.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Why Hippo Has No Hair'. Why doesn't Hippo have any hair? Well, you see Hippo used to have lots of hair until one night when things really got hot in Tinga Tinga.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Why Tortoise Has A Broken Shell'. Why does Tortoise have a cracked shell? Well, you see that's what happens when you have to jump off a cloud.

programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Mascot'. Liam is asked to help out the soccer team when an injury sidelines Raffi. Immediately thrilled to be part of the team - any team - Liam's joy turns to humiliation.

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Boov Flu Blues/Get Me To The Gorg'. Oh comes down with the Boov Flu and Tip accidentally turns him into a flu monster Tip help out all his friends when they freeze into Boovsicles.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Battering Ram'. After parts go missing from the garage, Ace and Skya solve the mystery when they discover D-Structs has a new claw-tail, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Battering Ram'. After parts go missing from the garage, Ace and Skya solve the mystery when they discover D-Structs has a new claw-tail, which they put to the test.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Sherman's Pet/Marco Polo'. Sherman begs Peabody to keep a woolly mammoth as his pet. Marco Polo wins three deadly noodle challenges and discovers spaghetti.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Imperfect Harmony'. The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Paramedic Paranormal'. When Jimmy breaks out in hives, Casper and his friends have no choice but to bring him to the human hospital.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Hide And Seek Whiz'. Noddy teaches Whiz how to play hide and seek. The robot has the perfect hiding spot on the edge of town, but after a while he begins to wish that Noddy would find him.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Mr Plod Loses His Laugh'. Mr. Plod concentrates so hard on not laughing in a 'keep a straight face' game with Noddy, that he swallows his laugh. Can the Toyland residents help him get his giggles back?

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Magnificent Magnet Girl'. When the rare comic book Olivia wants to get her Dad for Father's Day is sold out, she and her friends decide to act out the adventures of Magnet Girl, much to Dad's delight.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Puppy Love'. When Perry takes a liking to a dog that follows Olivia home, Olivia decides they should get married. Elaborate wedding plans ensue, but at the last minute, the 'bride' runs away.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Gong Heard 'Round The House / When The Dust Bunnies Come To Town'. Bob bangs a gong every time he performs an act of kindness in an effort to get his name on the new generosity shelter.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Holiday Hijinx'. There's no such thing as the perfect, simple gift for the members of the Pod 4. The kids over-think and over-plan their holiday gift giving.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Rope Burn'. When distracted spotter Birch turns away for a minute, Sandra falls and ends up twisting her ankle. Feeling immensely guilty, Birch offers her assistance.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - There's No Business...'. A chance to shine in a community film festival sees Liam behind the camera trying to 'direct' Sandra, who becomes a prima donna the second 'Action!' is called.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Growing Pains'. Birch is made painfully aware how, by being one year younger than the rest of her classmates, she is treated differently.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E14'. Michelle is feeling down and generally feeling lonely. Jason and the Penguin Crew try to cheer her up, but only succeed in making her feel worse. Nobody listens to her.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - A Movie Feast'. Pat has to deliver a film, screen and projector to Michael for his Open Air Movie Night in Pencaster Square.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - A Speedy Car'. Bill gets a remote control car for his birthday and Pat has to deliver it to Bill's party. On the way, Pat is delivering a remote to Ted, who is fixing Mrs Goggin's TV.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Bahama Drama'. The Wanderers visit penguins in Antarctica. Odlulu and Fritz use the Ice Castle Key, but separate some penguins from their eggs. The Wanderers must reunite them.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Caved And Confused'. When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Mom Genes'. When Grug takes Ugga hunting to find her inner growl again, she's as fierce as ever until coming face-to-face with a mom and baby too cute to catch.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. When The Croods experience the first-ever sugar-rush, they're hooked on the delicious new food, Grug is labeled a zombie after taking the first nap.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Friday Night Liyotes'. When Grug won't let her join his winning team, Eep forms her own underdog team in the first-ever sports competition Ahhh! Valley's annual Egg Toss.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Crood Who Knew Too Much/Scent Of A Thunk'. When Thunk is so stinky he kills animals with his stench, he pretends to be a great hunter, A spider ant bite gives Grug the biggest brain in town.

programme.title: Kind Van Die Noodlot

programme.desc: 'S5/E36 of 90'. Janice besluit om saam met Emile te werk, ter wille van Mortlocks. Bianca is oortuig Hein gaan vir Yvette vra om te trou en Beatrice slaap onder die sterre met Theo.

programme.desc: 'S2/E22 of 26'. Ons kyk na die ooreenkomste en verskille tussen verkoues, griep en Covid 19 en vind meer uit oor 'n baie innoverende mode ontwerper. Laastens maak ons 'n draai by Chimp Eden.

programme.title: eNuus

programme.title: Die Begin
programme.desc: Wat veronderstel was om die begin van die res van hul lewe te wees, is die begin van die einde vir Bea en Jan-Hendrik die aand toe hy haar vra om te trou.

programme.title: Die Boekklub
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 of 10'. 'n Beroemde skrywer maak weer haar opwagting in die dorp. Tom vra Lillie om sy roman te lees. Piet voel hy is nie genoeg van 'n man vir Vera en vra Anna om hulp.

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland

programme.title: Sê Jou Sê
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 of 13'. Wat is transgender? En as ons dit verstaan, wat is die praktiese en etiese kwessies wat ons moet aanspreek. Aden vra die moeilike vrae.

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai
programme.desc: Dev Patel leads a great cast in this powerful film based on the 2008 siege of the Taj Hotel. When terrorists take the hotel the staff risk their lives to protect the guests.

programme.title: Undercurrent: The Disappearance Of...
programme.desc: 'Undercurrent: The Disappearance Of Kim Wall Part 2: The Punishment'. Disturbing details emerge during Madsen's trial, depicting an unrepentant killer with misogynistic and sociopathic tendencies.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts won an Oscar for her role in this inspiring true story. A single mom becomes a legal assistant and takes on a company that is polluting a city's water supply.

programme.title: The Naturalist: The Life And Times...
programme.desc: 'The Naturalist: The Life And Times Of The Remarkable Marjorie Cortenay-Latime'. This doccie looks at a fish that was assumed to be extinct 66 million years ago and the woman who found it.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman plays God again, in this comic adventure about a modern-day man (Steve Carell) who is asked to prepare for the Biblical great flood. A spin-off of 2003's Bruce Almighty.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black enters the mystic world of martial arts in this animated adventure. An obese, mild-mannered panda is thrown into the middle of a battle for the fate of China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: When the murderous Lord Shen threatens China with a terrifying new weapon, Po must face a truth he never expected and defeat Shen for the good of Kung Fu.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Tommy Lee Jones star in this enjoyable action-comedy. An ex FBI Agent and ex-mob lawyer are forced to put aside their differences to fend off a potential mob hit.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock and Channing Tatum team up for this rom-com adventure. A romance novelist and her cover model get swept up in a kidnapping that lands them in a jungle adventure.

programme.title: Before I Go
programme.desc: With dark humour and heart, this film tells the story of a woman experiencing a midlife crisis. She considers suicide but decides to make one last attempt at finding happiness.

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: A book-inspired legal drama with sci-fi and heist themes. Frustrated with the justice system, a New York City public defender is pulled into a high-stakes heist to beat the system.

programme.title: Lady Boss: The Jackie Collins Story
programme.desc: A fascinating documentary following the inspiring life and career of brilliant writer Jackie Collins, who's known as the ultimate 'Lady Boss' and a master storyteller.

programme.title: Robots

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: This film proves that dynamite comes in small packages. A family of tiny people live beneath the floorboards of a cottage. But when their home is threatened, they take action.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: Dennis Quaid and Queen Latifah drive this family film. A grieving, shy 12-year-old relocates to rural Florida. There he encounters a captured Bengal tiger hidden in the woods.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox return for another action-packed, Michael Bay film. Sam must help the Autobots fight an ancient threat sworn on returning to get their revenge.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Maid Marian
programme.desc: Everyone knows Robin Hood, but this film follows Maid Marian. With news of King Richard's death and Robin returning, Marian leaves her sanctuary, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: The electrifying sequel to the hit movie based on the video game. When Dr Robotnik returns to Earth with a new ally, Knuckles, Sonic and his new friend Tails must stop them.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg directs this adaptation of the 1957 musical. Follow the forbidden love from two people from two rival teenage street gangs of different ethnic backgrounds.

programme.title: Deadlock (Aka Reactor)
programme.desc: A gang of mercenaries holds a nuclear power plant hostage.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Margot Robbie, Idris Elba and John Cena propel this sequel to the 2016 film. A task force of convicted supervillains undertakes a deadly mission on the island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 4'. An intriguing four-part ghost drama that explores the trauma of war as a terrifying spirit causes havoc in the Vietnamese-Australian community during the Hungry Ghost Festival.

programme.title: The Miracle Season
programme.desc: Uplifting sports drama. After the tragic death of a star volleyball player, a team of dispirited high school girls must band together to win the state championship.

programme.title: The Wrong Prince Charming
programme.desc: Not all is as it seems in this Vivica A Fox thriller. An entrepreneur meets a famed prince about investing in one of her properties but soon discovers he's not what he seems.

programme.title: Fatal Frenemies
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. A mother tries to figure out who could have framed her daughter, who is accused of murdering a high school track teammate.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder...
programme.desc: 'Morning Show Mysteries: Murder Ever After'. After finding bones in the basement of an old friend's house, Billie Blessings works with the new Head of Homicide to solve the case.

programme.title: Who Am I?
programme.desc: An exciting update of Jackie Chan's 1998 classic action comedy. A delivery person finds his life turned upside down after he falls into amnesia and is framed for murder.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: When a wedding planner falls in love with a groom, she decides the bride has to disappear.

programme.title: Double Take
programme.desc: Comedian Eddie Griffin stars in this funny action film about a man who gets in trouble after swapping identities with a crazy street hustler.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: In this action film, Jason Momoa does everything in his power to defend the ones he loves. A logger fights to protect his family from a dangerous group of drug runners.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves returns as the lethal assassin in this non-stop action thriller. John Wick comes out of retirement to help an old associate, pitting him against deadly killers.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Tom Hardy and Woody Harrelson face off in this thrilling sequel. After Eddie interviews the serial killer, Cletus Kasady, Kasady becomes the host of the deadly symbiote Carnage.

programme.title: Blood Conscious
programme.desc: A horrifying thriller. A vacationing family turns the tables on a mass shooter who claims to be fighting demonic forces.

programme.title: Se Nkganang
programme.desc: A teenager's life is thrown off balance when she discovers the parents that raised her as their own are actually not her biological parents.

programme.title: Ubaba Wase Next Door

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in depth.

programme.title: The Watchdog
programme.desc: For incisive, probing, public-service journalism stay tuned to The Watchdog where public officials, leaders of corporate South Africa and other entities are put on the platform to account to the public they serve or cater to.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: Stories Untold
programme.desc: The program celebrates inspirational stories, of ordinary people who overcome against the odds, and ultimately become agents for social change in healing the nation.

programme.title: Week-In-Review
programme.desc: A wrap of the week's stories. The show goes around the country and world in 1-hour. Analysts, Editors and Journalists help you make senses of complex issues through studio and virtual interviews.

programme.title: SA Today
programme.desc: SA Today is issue driven and covers regional topical issues in an interview format. Invited guests give more depth on big provincial and regional stories that can be an issue of national importance. It also includes general news.

programme.title: Full View

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Weaving Bad'. Tara accidentally ripped the tapestry when she rescued Bella. Now Cotton Lively, a trainee Everine from the 17th century who has a nasty disease, has escaped through the rip.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Horse Play'. Melchior and Binny are at the horseracing track to begin looking for Melchior's parents' clue. Binny gets hired as a stable girl where she meets Niklas, a hunky boy who also works there..

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Night of the Stench'. It's the Night of the Stench, when the bog turns against the village. Tara asks the tapestry what her future holds, and is horrified when it predicts Cameron's doom.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Drifty'. Tara is reunited with Fuggy, her old teddy bear. Fuggy could always get Tara to sleep as a baby, but now he has been mended with golden thread his lullaby sends you to sleep forever!

programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Children of the Spore/Anne of the Year'. A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious Frog of the Year award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Reunion'. When Anne reunites with her human friend Sasha, the frogs of Wartwood throw a huge party. Sasha later reveals to Anne her plan to get back home, but it will come at a grave cost.

programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Celebration'. As Mal, Evie, Carlos, Jay, and Freddie are bestowed their Jewels at the Jewel-bilee, all the AK's and VK's agree that they really are better when they're working together.

programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!'. Stuck on the plane on a precarious peak, Dewey and the kids must track down a torn photograph and confront Scrooge about Della's disappearance.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Shadow War Part 1: The Night of De Spell'. After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - The Shadow War Part 2: The Day of the Ducks!'. As Magica's shadow army descends Duckburg into chaos, the family bands together to save Scrooge as the kids prove they're every bit the adventurers their adult counterparts are.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - The Most Dangerous Game ... Night'. A game night is anything but relaxing as the family faces shrink rays, a barbaric civilization and an unhealthy level of competitiveness.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Gargoyle Gals, Supermarket Scandal'. Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life. Cricket can't fulfil an order for veg. What will he do?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Barry Cuda, Suite Retreat'. Cricket buys an annoying singing fish toy called Barry Cuda. Gramma realises being alone isn't as good as she thought.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Family Legacy, Paint Misbehavin''. Cricket doodles on abstract paintings in the café, upsetting artist Gloria. The collaboration's success leads to an ego clash.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E99 - Dearest Family'. Galette Day is eventful for Marinette! Tikki is acting very strange and three supervillains show up! Will Ladybug still manage to establish herself as queen of the day?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E102 - Penal Team'. When one of Shadow Moth's favorite victims is akumatized into Penalteam, a fearsome team of supervillains, Ladybug calls on her own superheroes to face her.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E103 - 4/103'. Without Ladybug and Cat Noir knowing, Shadow Moth patiently sets his final attack in motion...

programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Jig Is Up / Molly Vs. the Ghost World'. When the Ghost Council discovers joy in Brighton, Scratch must keep Molly out of harm's way. When Scratch is taken to the Ghost World for trial, Molly goes in to save him.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Lucky Penny / Lock, Stock, and Peril'. Molly and Scratch help Libby improve her luck on Friday the 13th. When the McGees get locked in the basement, Molly and Scratch seek help.

programme.desc: 'S6/E114 - Truth Will Sweat You Free, the'. Noah gets a mascot job downtown for The Marshal's unsavory new business, Parker asks Lou and Bill to teach him how to be a rancher, and Destiny gets hooked on Jake's videogames.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Once Upon a Time'. Griffin Campbell and his family move to a new town and take ownership of an abandoned hotel in hopes of restoring it back to the lively vacation destination it once was.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Somewhere in Time'. Griffin Campbell and his family move to a new town and take ownership of an abandoned hotel in hopes of restoring it back to the lively vacation destination it once was.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Straight Outta Time'. Griffin and Harper learn the camp dance is coming up, and that is the day Savannah went missing! Later, Harper meets Jess, and learns her mother did go to camp and hated Savannah!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Time'. Ben convinces Savannah to go to the dance, despite Griffin's efforts to stop her. When Savannah dances with Ben, Jess leaves in a jealous rage, alarming Griffin and Harper.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Time Warped'. Young Jess dares Savannah to spend the night in The Tremont basement with real ghosts. Young Ben comes to Savannah's defence. Young Jess storms off and wishes Savannah gone!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Long Time Gone'. Griffin and Harper sneak back through the portal to find a search party looking for Savannah. Police officers begin questioning and zero in on Griffin and Harper!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Savannah's ghost uses the old radio in the hidden room to reach out to Griffin and Harper.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Griffin and Harper successfully set the dial on the radio to take them back to 1962 where they find Savannah working at the Tremont with her new adoptive parents!

programme.title: Hannah Montana

programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!'. Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Storkules in Duckburg!'. When Storkules appears in Duckburg, Louie recruits him to start a monster fighting business. Storkules agrees but his biggest battle is to be Donald's roommate and maintain his friendship.

programme.desc: Join another revelatory word with Ps Gebhardt and Shannon Berndt, Senior Pastors of Empower Church.

programme.desc: Featuring the all-encompassing ministry of God's Word through the preaching and teachings of Kenneth W Hagin.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars in the Oscar-nominated film based on a true story of a captain and his crew who faced their fears head-on as they were hijacked by Somali pirates.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: 'S4/E46 - Dynamite 16 November 2022'. Features a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience!

programme.title: Lake Placid Vs. Anaconda
programme.desc: The ultimate showdown transpires when a giant crocodile and giant anaconda go head to head in a small town, in this frightening horror film.

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Inspector Eddie Chan (Jackie Chan) is tasked to track down a kidnapped businessman. One of the kidnappers operates within the police force and is determined to stop him.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: A married couple is surprised to find that they are both assassins hired by competing agencies to kill each other.

programme.title: Special - Hard vs Soft Sci-Fi
programme.desc: An in-depth look into the science fiction genre.

programme.title: Snakes On A Plane
programme.desc: When hundreds of venomous snakes invade an ill-fated trans-Pacific flight, Neville Flynn thwarts the twisted scheme of a deadly assassin.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Rami Malek gives an Oscar-winning performance in this epic biopic that tells the story of the rock icon Freddie Mercury and the legendary band Queen.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme reprises his role as the original Universal Soldier in the sixth film of the franchise. This time the Universal Soldiers are targeted by one lone warrior.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: 'I Am Legend' fans will love this action horror. In the near future, Earth is populated by vampires and a researcher (Ethan Hawke) must find a way to save mankind.

programme.title: 6 Bullets
programme.desc: An ex-mercenary is persuaded to help a martial artist find his missing daughter. He metes out justice to her kidnappers along the way.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York City cops, Billy Wong Jackie Chan and his partner, head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord, Mr Ko.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: An idyllic wildlife cruise disintegrates into terror when a party of tourists is stalked by a massive man-eating crocodile.

programme.title: Action Heroes - Ben Affleck
programme.desc: A look at Ben Affleck's action movies.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: A freak snowstorm traps a weather man in a town. When he wakes up he discovers that he is forced to relive the same day over and over again.

programme.title: Private Benjamin
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn stars in this comedy about a high society woman who joins the army after her husband dies on their wedding night.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A spectacular adventure that pits Godzilla against malevolent creatures that threaten the very existence of humans.

programme.title: Special - New Generation
programme.desc: A look at the new generation of stars.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves puts everything on the line in this final showdown. It's do or die in a battle for survival as the humans take on the machines.

programme.title: The Family Man
programme.desc: A ruthless businessman is magically transported into the life he would have had, had he married his childhood sweetheart.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: An elderly martial arts master teaches karate to a lonely and bullied teenager in this classic coming-of-age story.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Breaking All The Rules'. Jack introduces his parents to the spooky mystery of the Aswang. Plus, Ozzy is baffled by a video of suspected poltergeist activity.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Curse Of The Gas Giant'. Jupiter is hotter than it should be, and scientists are baffled. There's a strange discovery on Mars and detectives ask for NASA's help on a murder cold case.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Pearl Harbor'. December 7th, 1941 - a day of infamy that changed America forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did Franklin Roosevelt know about the attack beforehand?

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alien Invasion'. Across America, there are more UFO sightings than ever before. A team of UFO investigators want to find out what lies behind this increasing number of reports.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Pickles Saves The World Cup'. Don Wildman goes to London to see a statue marking a huge moment in British sporting history. He also visits a Civil War battle site altered by a vandal.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - The Real Q'. Host Don Wildman visits Britain's MI6 where spymasters groomed a gadget genius. He also visits a quirky monument honouring a mythical turtle.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Savior Of The Squalus And More'. Don Wildman examines an American memorial. Plus, he visits an iconic structure in Italy and a German park marking a sweet tale of a war hero.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Harlem Hellfighters'. Don Wildman heads to Harlem to view a memorial dedicated to little-known WWI heroes. Plus, he goes to the Pantheon in Paris to pay respect to an iconic inventor.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Black Magic Rocket Scientist'. Don Wildman heads to Pasadena, CA, to explore the mysterious death of a renowned scientist. He also examines one of Mt. Everest's deadliest disasters.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Missouri Mayhem'. A series of recent UFO sightings brings Chuck Zukowski's team to Missouri, the home of the 1973 Piedmont lights incident. Is history repeating itself?

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alien Harvesting'. Blood sucking aliens bring the team to Indiana. After some disturbing reports, the team are hot on the trail of a case of aliens allegedly stealing human blood.

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Black Ops Conspiracy'. Many people believe that Arizona is the centre of a government cover-up of alien activity. The team travel to Sedona, a known hotspot, to investigate.

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alien Invasion'. Across America, there are more UFO sightings than ever before. A team of UFO investigators want to find out what lies behind this increasing number of reports.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Hitting The Wall'. With time running out, the miners, physically and mentally drained, search for what they know is on Storø: rubies and sapphires. But will they come up trumps?

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Discord, Deer And Discovery'. After having been hit by a huge storm, the miners must band together to fix the damage to their camp. But with spirits low can they resolve the issue?

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Redemption Ridge'. With only 10 days left in Greenland, the team has one last chance. But with only four spots on the helicopter who gives them the best chances of striking it rich?

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Ruby Fever'. All winter long, the miner's dream of the rubies discovered atop an almost impossible-to-reach ridge just as winter's window closes in on them.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Belly Of The Red Beast'. The American miners have their sights set on what team geologist Eric Drummond believes could be the largest ruby deposit in the Arctic.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Secret Prisons'. A secret part of history has remained hidden, locked away for centuries in the hulls of ships in New York or in the depths of an abandoned copper mine.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies

programme.desc: 'S14/E2 of 12 - All Aboard The Gaslight Express'. Kenya bonds with Sheree and reveals some new tea about Drew. Marlo navigates muntyhood. Kandi and Todd struggle to find balance at home. Drew and Ralph try to resolve their marital issues.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Atlanta
programme.desc: 'S14/E3 of 12 - The Tea Is Served'. Kandi struggles with work-life balance. Kenya throws a fabulous birthday party for 3 year old Brooklyn where Sheree and Drew decide to confront one another over the recent rumours.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Atlanta
programme.desc: 'S14/E4 of 12 - Big Apple Squabbles'. The ladies travel to the Big Apple for Kandi's Broadway show, her gift bag generates unexpected buzz with her single friends. A condo reveals the cracks in Kandi and Todd's relationship.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...

programme.title: Die Argitekte
